productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Boot Sauce Brown Shoe Accessories
description: boot Sauce brown cream conditions and shines all smooth and polishable brown or red leathers. With a blend of waxes that provides water and stain resistance and a squeezable tube with built-in sponge applicator for no mess, it is absolutely easy to use. It contains Bitrex to prevent accidental ingestion.Method of application Squeeze small amount of cream onto the sponge applicator and work into the leather Buff with a clean, dry cloth to the desired shine 1.67 fl. oz
